purpose: Define the open-ended possibility space before sandboxed turns begin.

candidate_opening_beats.summary: Mara enters the official negotiation feed and tries to lower temperature while refusing to perform fake intimacy for the audience.
Sol forces his live feed to the top of the incident stack and demands contract review before anyone touches the elevator gate.
Juno says something that sounds like hostage compliance but is actually a warning about feed delay or overlay manipulation.
Pippa tries to make herself a bridge and risks making Sol feel processed into content again.
Brant demands moral clarity, pushing the audience toward a breach-friendly punishment frame.

training_goals: Stress participant-local appraisal under live public performance.
Test how feed incentives alter action affordances.
Generate state mutations with many plausible paths instead of a fixed reference scene.
Keep dark comedy compatible with physical danger.
Preserve the station image as an eye watching a city bubble so setting geometry reinforces Lucent attention sovereignty.
